revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-4-125

Electronic position indicator (E.P.I.)

A version of Loran in which the length of the base line is measured thus providing range information.

In practice the master station is placed on the survey vessel and two or more slave stations are temporarily set up ashore.

{{IALAFooter}}
